This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] customElementRegistry on a failed custom element created by calling createElement on CustomElementRegistry should return the registry
  assert_equals: expected object "[object CustomElementRegistry]" but got object "[object CustomElementRegistry]"
[FAIL] customElementRegistry on a failed custom element created by setting innerHTML should return the associated scoped registry
  assert_equals: expected object "[object CustomElementRegistry]" but got object "[object CustomElementRegistry]"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
